title: Karnataka HC directs BJP leader's son accused of rape on promise of marriage to pay ₹75k a month to victim
description: The Karnataka High Court recently directed rape accused Krishna Rao, son of BJP leader and Puttur Municipal Council member PG Jagannivas Rao, to deposit ₹75,000 to the victim and her 10-month-old child within a week. [Krishna J Rao v. State of Karnataka]Justice M Nagaprasanna observed while hearing the case,"The complainant who is 22 years of age has now become a mother. A girl who had to see opportunities in life, is now seeing a maternal life." Justice M NagaprasannaAdvocate Frances Xavier, ap
